name: Verda Finance
description: A bold dark-mode fintech design system that pairs a vivid mint accent with deep ink surfaces, oversized editorial display type, and confident pill controls for modern banking interfaces.
concept: Verda is a confident neo-banking system that treats money as something quiet and serious. Deep ink-green surfaces hold oversized editorial display type, a single high-voltage mint accent carries primary actions and live data, and softly floating stat cards punctuate the page like glyphs on a ledger. Geometry is rounded but disciplined: pill buttons, generous radii on cards, and a recurring plus-mark motif that signals growth and addition without leaning on illustrative metaphor.

palette.name: Ink
palette.role: Primary page background and base surface

palette.name: Bark
palette.role: Raised surfaces, cards, and panel fills

palette.name: Moss
palette.role: Hairline borders and subtle dividers on dark surfaces

palette.name: Mint Voltage
palette.role: Primary accent for CTAs, key data, and signature highlight

palette.name: Spring
palette.role: Secondary accent for soft highlights and hover halos

palette.name: Sage
palette.role: Muted body text, captions, and secondary labels

palette.name: Charcoal Ink
palette.role: Text and icon color on top of Mint Voltage surfaces

fonts.name: Manrope
fonts.usage: Display headings, hero copy, and prominent numerals

fonts.name: Inter
fonts.usage: Body text, navigation, labels, and UI controls

iconPack.name: Lucide
iconPack.usage: Used for interface, action, navigation, and feature icons across the system; rendered as 1.5px outline icons that inherit currentColor.
